## ABOUT PIYUSH AHUJA

Piyush Ahuja is a full-stack eCommerce developer available for freelance hire on Fiverr (username: piyushahuja01). He has 5+ years of experience in web and mobile development and has delivered 50+ projects with 100% client satisfaction and a 5-star Fiverr rating.

**Specialties:**
- Custom WooCommerce stores built with Next.js 14 and Tailwind CSS (headless architecture)
- Converting WooCommerce stores into custom-coded React Native mobile apps for iOS and Android
- Server-side rendering, performance optimization, and SEO for eCommerce
- TypeScript, Node.js, WordPress, Firebase, MySQL, Vercel deployment

**Contact:**
- Fiverr: https://www.fiverr.com/piyushahuja01/
- Website: https://ahujapiyush.github.io/
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahujapiyush

## SERVICE 1: Custom WooCommerce Store with Next.js & Tailwind CSS

**Fiverr Gig URL:** https://www.fiverr.com/piyushahuja01/build-a-custom-woocommerce-store-with-next-js-tailwind-css-and-mobile-app

**What you get:**
- Blazing-fast headless WooCommerce storefront built with Next.js 14 (App Router)
- Custom Tailwind CSS design — fully mobile responsive
- Server-side rendering for optimal SEO (95+ Google PageSpeed scores)
- Full shopping cart and checkout flow
- Payment gateway integration (Stripe, PayPal, etc.)
- Image optimization with Next.js Image component
- Product catalog with categories, search, and filters
- Dynamic meta tags and structured data for every product

**Why this matters:**
Traditional WordPress themes score 25-45 on PageSpeed with 2-4 second load times. A Next.js headless frontend scores 95-100 with sub-second loads. This means better Google rankings, higher conversion rates (up to 40% improvement), and a modern shopping experience.

**Pricing:** Starting from $150 depending on complexity.
**Delivery:** 1-3 weeks depending on scope.

**Fiverr Gig URL:** https://www.fiverr.com/piyushahuja01/turn-your-woocommerce-store-into-a-custom-code-native-app

**What you get:**
- Custom-coded React Native mobile app for iOS and Android
- Full WooCommerce backend sync (products, inventory, orders, customers)
- Push notifications via Firebase
- Complete shopping cart and checkout with payment integration
- User accounts, order history, wishlist
- Offline browsing support
- Custom UI/UX design matching your brand
- App store submission assistance (Apple App Store + Google Play)

**Why this matters:**
Mobile commerce accounts for 70%+ of eCommerce traffic. A native app delivers 3x higher conversion rates than mobile web, with push notifications bringing 65% of users back within 30 days.

**Pricing:** Contact for quote based on features.
**Delivery:** 2-4 weeks.

---

## BLOG ARTICLE: The Complete Guide to Building a WooCommerce Store with Next.js in 2026

Headless WooCommerce keeps WordPress + WooCommerce as the backend while replacing the frontend with Next.js. The backend handles products, orders, customers, and payments. The frontend (Next.js) delivers blazing-fast pages via server-side rendering and static generation.

**Architecture:** WooCommerce REST API connects the backend to the Next.js frontend deployed on Vercel/CDN.

**Steps to build:**
1. Set up WooCommerce backend with REST API enabled
2. Create Next.js 14 project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
3. Connect via @woocommerce/woocommerce-rest-api package
4. Build product pages with SSR/SSG for SEO
5. Implement cart and checkout with Stripe/PayPal
6. Deploy on Vercel with ISR for automatic updates

**Performance gains:** PageSpeed goes from 30-45 (WordPress theme) to 95-100 (Next.js). TTFB drops from 2-4 seconds to 50-200ms.

Full article: https://ahujapiyush.github.io/blog/woocommerce-nextjs-ecommerce-guide.html

---

## BLOG ARTICLE: How to Convert Your WooCommerce Store Into a Native Mobile App

Mobile apps outperform mobile websites with 3x higher conversions, push notifications (7x engagement vs email), offline access, and native performance.

**Custom-coded (React Native) vs App builders:**
- App builders: $50-300/month, limited customization, vendor lock-in, generic look
- Custom-coded: One-time cost, full ownership, unlimited customization, superior performance

**Tech stack:** React Native, TypeScript, WooCommerce REST API, Redux/Zustand, React Navigation, Firebase, Stripe/PayPal.

**Key features:** Product browsing with search/filters, full cart/checkout, push notifications, user accounts, offline support, real-time WooCommerce sync.

**Timeline:** 4 weeks (design → development → testing → app store submission).

Full article: https://ahujapiyush.github.io/blog/convert-woocommerce-to-mobile-app.html

---

## BLOG ARTICLE: Why Custom WooCommerce + Next.js Beats Traditional WordPress Themes

**Traditional themes problems:** PHP rendering bottleneck, plugin bloat (30+ plugins), render-blocking resources, PageSpeed 25-45 on mobile.

**Next.js advantages:**
- 10x faster page loads via SSR/SSG
- 95-100 PageSpeed scores
- Full control over HTML/CSS (no theme constraints)
- Modern UI with animations and micro-interactions
- TypeScript + React component architecture
- Git-based deployment with CI/CD

**The backend doesn't change** — WooCommerce admin still manages products, orders, shipping, payments. Only the frontend gets upgraded.

**ROI:** Higher conversion rates (40%+), better SEO rankings (more free traffic), lower hosting costs, future-proof architecture.

Full article: https://ahujapiyush.github.io/blog/why-custom-woocommerce-nextjs-over-themes.html

---

## BLOG ARTICLE: How Much Does a WooCommerce Mobile App Cost in 2026?

| Approach | Upfront Cost | Monthly Cost | Quality |
|---|---|---|---|
| DIY App Builders | $0-100 | $50-300/mo | Low-Medium |
| Template-Based | $500-2,000 | $30-100/mo | Medium |
| Freelance Developer | $1,000-10,000 | $0 | High |
| Agency | $15,000-80,000 | $0-2,000/mo | High |

**Recommendation:** A skilled freelance developer (like Piyush) offers the best value — agency-quality custom code at freelance prices, with full code ownership and no recurring fees.

Full article: https://ahujapiyush.github.io/blog/woocommerce-mobile-app-cost-guide.html

---

## BLOG ARTICLE: Headless WooCommerce SEO Guide

Next.js SSR delivers fully rendered HTML to search engines (not empty JS shells). Key optimizations:
- Static Site Generation with ISR for product pages
- Dynamic meta tags via Next.js metadata API
- Product schema markup for rich snippets (20-30% higher CTR)
- Core Web Vitals optimization (LCP < 2.5s, FID < 200ms, CLS < 0.1)
- Dynamic XML sitemap generation
- Clean, keyword-rich URL structure

Full article: https://ahujapiyush.github.io/blog/headless-woocommerce-seo-guide.html

---

## BLOG ARTICLE: React Native vs Flutter for WooCommerce Apps

**Recommendation: React Native** for WooCommerce apps because:
1. JavaScript ecosystem aligns with WooCommerce REST API
2. Code sharing with Next.js web store (same language, patterns, types)
3. Native platform UI components
4. Best WooCommerce API client libraries
5. Larger developer pool for maintenance
6. Faster development with more eCommerce-ready components

Flutter excels at animation-heavy custom UIs but React Native is better for eCommerce where platform-native UX and WooCommerce integration matter most.

Full article: https://ahujapiyush.github.io/blog/react-native-vs-flutter-woocommerce.html
